title: Medical records
description: SOAP visits linked to each patient.
search_placeholder: Search by patient, owner, reason or clinical notes…

filter.abiertas_antiguas_hint: {{count}} open visit(s) have been open for more than 24 hours. Highlighted rows are the oldest.

empty.no_results_description: Try clearing filters or changing your search.
empty.no_records_description: Create the first visit with the «New visit» button.

form.paciente_locked_hint: Patient cannot be changed when editing.
form.soap_hint: SOAP format: subjective/anamnesis (owner), objective/clinical examination, assessment and plan/treatment.
form.cerrada_hint: SOAP data and vitals cannot be edited until the visit is reopened.
form.abierta_banner: This visit is still open. Close it when care and billing are complete.
form.plan_tratamiento_hint: Set medications, dates and instructions. Daily follow-up notes are recorded on the «Treatment plan» page.

delete.title: Delete this visit?
delete.description: The visit will be removed from this list.

plan.page_description: Medication plan summary and dated follow-up notes.
plan.empty_no_plan_description: If you have management permission, define the plan using the form below. Daily follow-up is recorded after the plan is saved.
plan.empty_readonly_hint: There is no plan for this visit yet. A user with management permission can create it on this screen.
plan.consulta_cerrada_aviso: This visit is closed: you cannot edit the plan or add follow-up notes until it is reopened.

editor.update_description: Plan dates, status, and general instructions save automatically when you change them. Each medication is saved when you close the side panel.

plan.lineas_empty_hint_manage: Use «Add medication» in the block above, or edit a line from the side panel.

linea.medicamento_hint: You can link an inventory product and edit the label if needed.
linea.cantidad_inventario_hint: Planned or dispensed amount; saving the plan does not move inventory.
linea.stock_sede_nota: Read-only. The plan does not deduct inventory.
linea.sin_detalle: No dose or schedule on this line

lineas_editor.dashed_title: No medications in the plan yet
lineas_editor.dashed_hint: Click here or «Add medication» to open the panel and add the first line.
lineas_editor.row_open_edit_title: View and edit dose, route, frequency and notes in the panel
lineas_editor.autosave_hint: Changes save automatically when you edit lines or plan details.
lineas_editor.delete_confirm_description: «{{medicamento}}» will be removed from the list. The change is saved when you confirm.

cierre_prompt.title: Close this visit?
cierre_prompt.description: The visit was saved. Mark it as closed so it no longer appears as pending in the list?

cerrar_abiertas.title: Close all open visits?
cerrar_abiertas.description: This will close {{count}} open visit(s) across the clinic. You will need to reopen each one individually if required.
